falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive sessions
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern featured VIX peaking at 28 and rapidly mean-reverting; sustained VIX above 35 indicates a systemic stress event (credit contagion, liquidation cascade) that breaks the pattern's volatility structure, invalidating the 'controlled correction' thesis

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts by more than -50bps from current level
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with curve steepening (growth scare resolution); acute deepening inversion signals recession pricing that overrides the pattern's 'soft landing' macro regime, proving the 78% match was superficial price-action similarity without regime alignment

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below its August 5, 2024 panic low (5189.22) on volume exceeding 120% of the 20-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A pattern-matched bottom requires the prior structural low to hold as support; breaking that level on expanding volume confirms distribution, not accumulation, and demonstrates the 'bottom' was actually a bear market rally continuation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
